description_long: This object is a large, rectangular guitar amplifier with a black textured exterior and a silver control panel on the front. The front face features two prominent circular speaker cones behind a mesh grille, with a row of metallic knobs and switches above, labeled 'Deluxe Amp.' A black carrying handle is mounted on the top, and a long audio cable is plugged into the front input jack, trailing onto the ground. The rear panel is mostly flat and silver, with a warning label indicating electrical hazard, a power cable, and a visible power socket. The amplifier sits on a cracked concrete surface, suggesting it is used in rugged urban or outdoor environments.
description: A large black and silver guitar amplifier with dual speakers, control knobs, and visible input and power cables. It features a carrying handle and a warning label on the back.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the dual speaker cones, control panel with knobs, input jack with cable, and the handle on top.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the control panel, handle, and the trailing input cable, with the amplifier's right side visible.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the silver back panel, warning label, power socket, and attached power cable.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the warning label, power socket, and the amplifier's right side, with the power cable trailing onto the ground.
